subcodes.first_line: O companion and intimate friend! Though the letter of reply hath been delayed by some days, yet in every moment the thought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار همنشین جوابنامه هر چند ایامی چند تاخیر افتاد ولی در هر دقیقه تصور
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
